Test name: CCFTap (20 km/h -ego-, 60 km/h -target-)

Test Description

In this scenario, the subject vehicle turns to the farside in an intersection and then finds a target vehicle which is travelling in perpendicular direction from the nearside of the subject vehicle.

  • Regulation or protocol: EURONCAP 2023 TP AEB/CarCar
  • Ego speed: 20 km/h
  • Target speed: 60 km/h
  • Overlap between both vehicles: 50 %
  • TTC at start: greater than 4 s
Home Summary Repetition 1
←CCRm offset 50 CCFTap (20 km/h -ego-, 60 km/h -target-)
